ts-2000.description: Kenwood TS-2000 compatible mode. The TX-500MP shares the LAB599 CAT protocol family with the TX-500 but may have a reduced command subset. Extended LAB599 commands may not be fully supported.

evidence.description: Hamlib tx500.c backend - serial configuration (shared with TX-500MP)

provenance.notes: Serial configuration inferred from Hamlib backend. Official documentation should be consulted for verification.

evidence.description: TX-500MP User Manual - basic CAT commands

provenance.notes: Extended LAB599 commands (TX0, TX1, RX, KI, PC, AG) are listed as unsupported pending verification of TX-500MP-specific support. The TX-500MP may have a reduced command subset compared to TX-500 extended mode.

provenance.notes: PTT methods assumed similar to TX-500. Official verification recommended.

known_issues.title: Extended Command Support Uncertain
known_issues.description: The TX-500MP shares the LAB599 CAT protocol family with the TX-500 but may have a reduced command subset. Extended commands (TX0, TX1, RX, KI, PC, AG) available on TX-500 extended mode may not be fully supported on TX-500MP. Verify specific command support against official TX-500MP documentation before relying on extended features.
known_issues.workaround: Use standard TS-2000 commands for maximum compatibility. Consult official TX-500MP documentation for confirmed extended command support.

known_issues.title: Mobile Installation Power Considerations
known_issues.description: The TX-500MP is designed for mobile installation and may have different power management behavior compared to the portable TX-500. Ensure adequate power supply for full-power operation.
known_issues.workaround: Use a dedicated 12V power supply rated for at least 10A continuous. Avoid sharing power with other high-current devices.

recommendations.notes: The TX-500MP shares the LAB599 CAT protocol family with the TX-500 but extended command support is uncertain. Use TS-2000 standard commands for maximum compatibility. Extended LAB599 commands should be verified against official TX-500MP documentation before use. This profile uses conservative capability assumptions pending official verification.

provenance.notes: Primary sources are official LAB599 documentation and Hamlib backend. Extended command support for TX-500MP specifically requires verification. Conservative capability assumptions applied pending official confirmation of TX-500MP-specific features.
